description.value: Price 5,000 gp; Slot none; CL 3rd; Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint necromancy DESCRIPTION When hung above a door or other portal, this smooth, scarab-shaped stone prevents undead creatures from entering. An intelligent undead creature attempting to move through the warded portal or touch the stone must attempt a DC 13 Will save. If it fails, the creature cannot make another attempt until 24 hours have passed. If it succeeds, the creature is immune to the stoneâs effect for 24 hours. Nonintelligent undead creatures donât get a saving throw against the effect. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 2,500 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells command undead
